slice: Kea full witness profile (Decision B) — nq.witness.kea_dhcp.v0
lane: operator-directed (Decision B = full witness profile now; ChatGPT: 'full profile, minimal V0 backend, composite later')
doctrine: A backend integration supplies observations; only a conforming witness supplies testimony. A lease is an assignment record, not a fact about the world. Keep DHCP from laundering DNS, and DNS from laundering identity.

repos_touched.nq (LOCAL, held): BASELINE_SERVICE_ROLLOUT kea bucket + Decision B resolved; FEATURE_HISTORY KEA follow-on note; loop + this receipt

profile.grounded_in: real kea-dhcp4 2.2.0 lab data captured earlier (memfile cols + lease4-get-all API + lease_cmds hook + state 0/1/2 semantics)
profile.key_semantics: lease_state (default/declined/expired-reclaimed) is INDEPENDENT of expire_at (a default lease can be lapsed); fqdn_fwd/fqdn_rev are DDNS INTENT, never a DNS-content claim
profile.native_reader_role: parse_kea_leases (memfile, lab-backed) = first backend adapter with HONEST partial coverage (lease identity/lifecycle only; daemon/subnet/reservation/DDNS demoted to cannot_testify). Control-socket backend extends coverage, does not change the contract.
profile.future_composite_named_not_built: dhcp_dns_identity_consistency — composes Kea + DNS testimony; refuses host identity, reachability, global DNS correctness, authorization

scope_guard: Full PROFILE now, not full adapter maximalism. Did NOT build the control-socket backend, the kea_dhcp_state claim kind, or the composite — recorded as next/deferred. Did NOT push (workweek). 'Full profile, minimal V0 backend, composite later.'
verify: Profile matches nq-witness SPEC report shape + the zfs/smart/fs_inode profile conventions; two example reports (control-socket full coverage + memfile-only honest partial demotion); SPEC profiles index updated. nq gap-status gate green (no gaps touched).
acceptance: Kea promoted to a first-class conforming witness profile; native memfile reader mapped as first backend with honest coverage; refusal boundary complete. Decision B resolved. Loop AUDIT/idle. HELD (workweek no-push) — nq 6-ahead, nq-witness 1-ahead. NEXT per rollout: TLS certificate-state spec, or time_basis sanity (Decision C).
